title: Medhat Said
text:
Education
Department of Clinical Pharmacology and Pharmacy, Amsterdam UMC | Amsterdam, the Netherlands PhD in Clinical Pharmacometrics | Apr 2022 - ongoing

Leiden University | Leiden, the Netherlands BSc in Bio-Pharmaceutical Sciences | Sept 2016 - Jul 2019

title: Medhat Said
text:
Experience
Currently, I am focusing on population pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic modelling of imatinib which is currently being research for its repurposing potential in other disease indications.
Previous intern experiences include:

Development of a novel cardiovascular systems model to quantify drugs effects on the inter-relationship between contractility and other hemodynamic variables
Development of a minimal PBPK model to predict pharmacokinetics and target disposition for recycling and sweeping antibodies
